communication.name: makeAudioOrVideoCallToYourContact
communication.description: Initiates a call (audio or video) to another user by their User ID. The type of call is determined by 'isVideo'. If 'isVideo' is true, it initiates a video call; if false, an audio call. Example: {'name': 'makeAudioOrVideoCallToYourContact', 'parameters': {'toUserID': '1234', 'isVideo': true}}

communication.name: sendCryptoToYourContact
communication.description: Sends a specified amount of cryptocurrency to another user by their User ID or address'. Example: {'name': 'sendCryptoToYourContact', 'parameters': {'toUserID': '1234', 'amount': 10.5, 'asset': 'ETH asset object containing id, type, symbol fields'}}. Always verify asset with getAssetIDs first.

communication.name: requestCryptoFromYourContact
communication.description: Requests a specified amount of cryptocurrency to receive from another user by their User ID. Example: {'name': 'requestCryptoFromYourContact', 'parameters': {'fromUserID': '1234', 'amount': 5.2, 'asset': 'BTC asset object containing id, type, symbol fields'}}. Always verify asset with getAssetIDs first.

communication.name: sendChatMessageToYourContacts
communication.description: Sends a chat message to users by their User ID. Either as a direct message or in a group. Example: {'name': 'sendChatMessageToYourContacts', 'parameters': {'userIDs': ['1234', '5678'], 'message': 'Hello', 'isGroupMessage': false}}

communication.name: sendContactRequestToUsers
communication.description: Sends a contact request to specified User IDs.

userIDs.description: The unique identifiers of the users to whom the contact requests will be sent.

communication.name: inviteFriendsByEmail
communication.description: Invite friends to join the application by sending them an invitation email.

emails.description: List of email addresses to invite.

personalMessage.description: Optional. A personal message to include in the invitation email.

data_processing.name: summarizeURLs
data_processing.description: Creates a summary of the content at the provided URLs. The summary will be concise, highlight the key points, and accept a maximum token size for the summary. URLs must point to text-based content (e.g., TXT, CSV, HTML, JSON, XML, etc.) or PDF files.

context.description: Optional. Additional context to guide the summarization.

maxTokens.description: The maximum token size for the summary. Should be atleast 1000 usually for usefulness.
